bead.title: checks: residual production-reachability — internal/bead core
bead.description:
PROBLEM
Current deadcode RTA on 2026-05-15 still reports residual core bead helpers as unreachable from the production graph, so `ddx-83440482` cannot close from current-tree evidence.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
`.ddx/executions/20260515T210515-1a20052a/production-reachability-final.json` reports residual dead symbols across `cli/internal/bead/archive.go:37`, `axon_backend.go:112`, `context.go:18`, `id.go:77`, `lifecycle.go:133`, `operation.go:12`, and `reconcile.go:307`.

PROPOSED FIX
Resolve every symbol currently listed for these files in the committed artifact. WIRE APIs that should be exercised by the real bead store/runtime path; DELETE speculative or test-only helpers with no production caller. If any symbol still needs deferred investigation after ~15 minutes, annotate it with `// wiring:pending <follow-up-bead-id>` and file the narrower follow-up before closing this bead.

NON-SCOPE
- Do not touch `internal/bead/axon/subscription.go`; that residual work is tracked separately.
- Do not change the production-reachability protocol or checker implementation.
bead.acceptance:
1. Every symbol currently listed for this cluster in `.ddx/executions/20260515T210515-1a20052a/production-reachability-final.json` is either wired into the production graph or deleted.
2. `cd cli && go run golang.org/x/tools/cmd/deadcode@v0.42.0 ./... | rg 'internal/bead/(archive|axon_backend|context|id|lifecycle|operation|reconcile)\.go'` returns no hits.
3. Any remaining `// wiring:pending` annotation created while resolving this cluster cites an open follow-up bead.
4. Decisions log written to `.ddx/executions/<run-id>/decisions.md` records WIRE|DELETE|PENDING for each listed symbol.
5. `cd cli && go test ./...` passes.
6. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
